profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Putra Rajawali Kencana Tbk provides transportation services in Indonesia. The company engages in the transportation of solid commodity goods and supporting materials for development and construction using cargo box vehicles and flatbed trucks. It is also involved in transportation management; supply chain logistics; warehousing, leasing; and wholesale or retail trading. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in Surabaya, Indonesia.
